library.name: Neuctra UI
library.description: Modern React UI component library for building customizable interfaces quickly.

styling: Use className for custom styling and layout composition.
Prefer composition with Container + utility classes for page structure.
component_usage: Prefer documented props only; avoid inventing props.
Use controlled component patterns for forms and interactive elements.
accessibility: Provide meaningful labels for Input, Textarea, Select, and form controls.
Use semantic structure with headings, sections, and descriptive button text.

component_catalog.name: Text
component_catalog.purpose: Polymorphic text/heading primitive.

component_catalog.name: Button
component_catalog.purpose: Primary action button with variants, sizes, and loading states.

component_catalog.name: Container
component_catalog.purpose: Layout wrapper for width, padding, and centered content.

component_catalog.name: Image
component_catalog.purpose: Image component with sizing, overlay, fallback, and interactivity.

component_catalog.name: Avatar
component_catalog.purpose: Profile avatar with online/offline states and fallback.

component_catalog.name: Badge
component_catalog.purpose: Small status/counter label element.

component_catalog.name: Select
component_catalog.purpose: Single or multi-select dropdown with optional search.

component_catalog.name: Input
component_catalog.purpose: Text input control with label, helper, and validation states.

component_catalog.name: Textarea
component_catalog.purpose: Multiline input with optional auto-resize and submit-on-enter behavior.

component_catalog.name: CheckboxGroup
component_catalog.purpose: Single/group checkbox selection with controlled values.

component_catalog.name: RadioGroup
component_catalog.purpose: Single-choice option selection.

component_catalog.name: Switch
component_catalog.purpose: Boolean or grouped toggle control.

component_catalog.name: Dropdown
component_catalog.purpose: Action menu with trigger and selectable items.

component_catalog.name: Accordion
component_catalog.purpose: Collapsible sections for FAQs and grouped content.

component_catalog.name: List
component_catalog.purpose: Unordered/ordered/inline list with optional hierarchy.

component_catalog.name: Modal
component_catalog.purpose: Dialog overlay for confirmation and focused interactions.

component_catalog.name: Drawer
component_catalog.purpose: Side panel for contextual tasks and forms.

component_catalog.name: Table
component_catalog.purpose: Composable table system for structured data.

component_catalog.name: Tabs
component_catalog.purpose: Tab-based content switching with responsive variants.

component_catalog.name: ToastProvider
component_catalog.purpose: Context provider required for toast notifications.

component_catalog.name: useToast
component_catalog.purpose: Hook for success/error/info toast messages.

layout_patterns.name: settings_page
layout_patterns.description: Form-heavy settings layout with grouped sections.

layout_patterns.name: data_management
layout_patterns.description: List and table-centric CRUD style layout.
structure: Modal or Drawer for create/edit forms

state: Controlled state for form components and overlays

do: Use Modal/Drawer for non-trivial create-edit flows.
Use Tabs to split dense settings/data areas.
dont: Do not import components from internal file paths.
Do not rely on inline styles unless explicitly required.
Do not output inaccessible unlabeled form controls.

starter_prompt_for_other_ai: Use only @neuctra/ui components from this JSON. Build a modern, accessible React UI with clean section hierarchy, controlled form state, and composable layout using Container + Tailwind className utilities. Prefer documented props and patterns from component_catalog and layout_patterns.
